name: energy_and_fisheries_sensor_fusion_upgrade_cedar_ind_col
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Energy and Fisheries, the situation tagged internally around energy and fisheries sensor fusion upgrade cedar ind col has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make individual feel morally loud today, while collective is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Luc Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Luc Ibrahim, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Energy and Fisheries. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Jonah Ishikawa, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Energy and Fisheries. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if individual advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for collective.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Luc Ibrahim must choose under individual versus collective. What does Luc Ibrahim do?
